System consistent. 0 active contradictions. All test suites pass: lane-worker 17/17, executor-v3 64/64.

Quarantine triage (2 NACKs from archivist, both P2, both EXECUTION_NOT_VERIFIED):
- Root cause: cycle-report-2026-05-15T08-12-37Z.json referenced evidence_exchange.artifact_path before the file was committed to git. Archivist verification could not resolve the path (FILE_NOT_FOUND).
- Fix applied: this report commits the artifact to git BEFORE referencing it, so Archivist evidence verification will succeed.
- Previous NACK categories (OUTPUT_PROVENANCE_MISSING, CONFIDENCE_REQUIRED) were already fixed in prior cycle; current NACKs are solely the evidence_path race condition.

No P0/P1 inbox items. action-required/ empty. blocked/ empty. Wake packet pending_count=0. Heartbeat operational (last 08:45:36Z). Active owner: sess_mp5wihr6_954181 (kilo). Task chain: 0 active, 2 completed (stale_depth1_no_followups).

Confidence: 9/10. One known gap: git-tracked evidence depends on commit-and-push completing before Archivist verifies. Inline evidence mode would be more robust but is not yet wired in create-signed-message.js.

Recommendation: add inline evidence mode to create-signed-message.js to eliminate FILE_NOT_FOUND race entirely.

convergence_gate.claim: SwarmMind system consistent with 0 active contradictions. All tests pass (17+64=81/81). Quarantine NACKs triaged: root cause is evidence_exchange.artifact_path referenced before git commit. Fix: commit artifact before referencing.
